claim_boundary: Do not treat metadata, fixtures, simulations, or cell-level data as pack-level validated aviation battery performance.

current_aviation_battery_gap.battery_sufficiency_index_boundary: model diagnostic only, not a real technology score
current_aviation_battery_gap.central_message: Known audited comparable performance is not yet populated; mission requirements and simulations define the gap envelope.

exact_evidence_boundary.experimentally_measured: CMU source is approved; measurement values count only after parser and unit checks pass.
exact_evidence_boundary.simulation_only: Aviation grid, long-haul stress tests, candidate envelopes, and pack trade space are diagnostics.
exact_evidence_boundary.unknown: Comparable pack-level aviation measurements, safety, degradation, thermal transients, cost, and manufacturability remain open.

feasibility_blockers: No comparable audited pack-level aviation battery measurements are available.
CMU eVTOL source is cell-level evidence and cannot prove pack sufficiency.
Manufacturer examples are context records with mixed official/third-party boundaries.
Long-haul feasibility remains simulation-only and expected-infeasible under current assumptions.
Candidate ranking is blocked until uncertainty, safety, cycle-life, and system boundaries are audited.

dataset_candidates.likely_usefulness: First approved experimental source for cell-level aviation-duty-cycle parsing and measurement audit.
dataset_candidates.limitations: Cell-level duty-cycle measurements only; not pack-level proof and not chemistry ranking evidence without comparable audited records.
dataset_candidates.name: Carnegie Mellon eVTOL Battery Dataset

dataset_candidates.likely_usefulness: Potential source of comparable cycle-life and degradation records once dataset-level licenses and metadata are audited.
dataset_candidates.limitations: Repository aggregates multiple datasets; each dataset needs separate license, protocol, and uncertainty review.
dataset_candidates.name: Battery Archive

dataset_candidates.likely_usefulness: Useful for degradation-model benchmarks and uncertainty-aware life prediction once source terms are approved.
dataset_candidates.limitations: Aerospace relevance is indirect and data formats may require legacy MATLAB parsing.
dataset_candidates.name: NASA Prognostics Center of Excellence Battery Data Set

dataset_candidates.likely_usefulness: Candidate source for battery aging and reliability validation if dataset-level terms allow reproducible ingestion.
dataset_candidates.limitations: Needs explicit redistribution review before records can be published through this repo.
dataset_candidates.name: CALCE Battery Research Group Data

dataset_candidates.likely_usefulness: Strong degradation-model benchmark for early-cycle feature extraction and prediction workflows.
dataset_candidates.limitations: Not aviation-duty-cycle data and cannot be used as aviation pack evidence without model translation.
dataset_candidates.name: Data-driven prediction of battery cycle life before capacity degradation

dataset_candidates.likely_usefulness: Candidate benchmark for degradation-model comparison after the exact archive, terms, and schema are confirmed.
dataset_candidates.limitations: Placeholder discovery row until the exact record URL, license, and file schema are reviewed.
dataset_candidates.name: Oxford Battery Degradation Dataset

dataset_candidates.likely_usefulness: Useful for materials discovery context and candidate linkage but not experimental performance evidence.
dataset_candidates.limitations: Computed materials metadata cannot be ranked as achieved battery performance or aviation readiness.
dataset_candidates.name: Materials Project Battery Explorer and Materials API
dataset_candidates.system_boundary: materials metadata and computed properties, not battery measurements

dataset_candidates.likely_usefulness: Good for discovering primary technical reports and datasets that may later be audited.
dataset_candidates.limitations: Metadata does not contain validated battery performance and must not appear in measurement views.
dataset_candidates.name: OSTI battery and aviation metadata search

dataset_candidates.likely_usefulness: Useful for identifying NASA electric aircraft studies for mission-model reproduction.
dataset_candidates.limitations: Records need report-level audit before any numeric aircraft or battery values are extracted.
dataset_candidates.name: NASA NTRS electric aircraft and battery metadata

dataset_candidates.likely_usefulness: Candidate source for charging, infrastructure, and operating-context assumptions in aviation electrification studies.
dataset_candidates.limitations: Battery-cell performance may be absent; exact dataset selection and license review are required.
dataset_candidates.name: NREL Transportation and Battery Data Catalog
dataset_candidates.system_boundary: mixed transportation, charging, and battery-adjacent records

dataset_candidates.category: battery safety, abuse, and energy storage reliability
dataset_candidates.likely_usefulness: Candidate source for thermal runaway, containment, and safety-boundary assumptions.
dataset_candidates.limitations: Included as a source-discovery target until a specific dataset with clear license and schema is identified.
dataset_candidates.name: Sandia Energy Storage Safety and Reliability Resources
dataset_candidates.system_boundary: safety and abuse-test resources with mixed publication forms

dataset_candidates.category: battery data standards and interoperable metadata
dataset_candidates.likely_usefulness: Useful for improving schema interoperability and provenance fields before ingesting more datasets.
dataset_candidates.limitations: This is primarily schema and ecosystem context unless a specific measurement dataset is selected.
dataset_candidates.name: Battery Data Genome / Battery Data Alliance resources
dataset_candidates.system_boundary: data standards and possible linked battery datasets

simulation_summary.phase_status: simulation campaign active; validation still pending
what_would_need_to_be_true: Audited full-cell measurements need comparable system boundaries and uncertainty.
Pack overhead, containment, thermal control, reserve, and degradation margins need explicit mass accounting.
Mission feasibility needs published aircraft-study validation and transient power checks.
Candidate material envelopes need cycle-life, safety, manufacturing, and source-lineage evidence before ranking.
Hemp-derived graphitic carbon needs primary-paper audit and full-cell translation before any aviation claim.
Long-haul battery-electric studies need aircraft-validated aero/propulsion models, reserve rules, pack mass closures, and thermal transients.
